description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a rectangular yard with green grass. The structure features large, dark-tinted windows and a prominent rooftop terrace with a central pool or water feature. The exterior is primarily composed of white and gray surfaces, with black accents and clean, geometric lines. The house is enclosed by a low perimeter wall, and the yard includes paved walkways, outdoor seating areas, and landscaped elements. The main entrance is sheltered by an overhang and is accessible via a paved path. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A sleek, modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a rooftop terrace with a pool, set within a walled yard featuring paved paths and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, overhang, and the symmetrical layout of the yard and house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop terrace, pool, and the arrangement of windows and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, additional seating, and the full width of the house and yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the side entrance, landscaping, and the continuation of the rooftop terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and minimalistic door, framed by clean lines and no decorative columns.
